infoBanner: 🧩 Our beads are 2.6mm mini fuse beads, produced by the same factory as Artkal. We use the MARD 221 color system — a wider palette, fully compatible with Artkal mini beads.

hero.badge: 🎨 Free Online Tool · No Sign-up Required
hero.title: Turn Any Photo into a
hero.subtitle: Upload your image and instantly generate a custom bead pattern using the full Artkal 221 color palette. Get an exact bead count and order everything in one click.
hero.patternLibraryDesc: Kawaii, animals, food, seasonal — dozens of ready-to-use bead patterns, completely free.
hero.howItWorksTitle:
From photo to finished pattern
in 3 simple steps
hero.step1Desc: Drag & drop any photo — a pet, character, logo, or anything you love. JPG, PNG, and WebP supported.
hero.step2Desc: Instantly mapped to the Artkal 221 palette. Adjust grid size, colors, and fine details with live preview.
hero.step3Desc: Download your pattern as PDF, get an exact bead count, and add all required colors to your cart in one click.
hero.feature1Desc: Every color automatically matched to the official Artkal palette — no manual color picking needed.
hero.feature2Desc: Get a precise count for every color used. Know exactly how many beads to buy before you start.
hero.feature3Desc: Use brush, eraser, and eyedropper tools to refine your design pixel by pixel.
hero.feature4Desc: Download a print-ready pattern with color codes, grid lines, and a full color legend.
hero.feature5Desc: Add all required colors directly to your Yaya's Creative Studio cart — no manual searching.
hero.feature6Desc: Save multiple patterns and come back to them anytime. No account or sign-up required.
hero.ctaTitle: Ready to start your next bead project?
hero.ctaSubtitle: Free to use · No sign-up · Works on any device

sidebar.modeHint: clean = no dithering + stronger simplify · vivid = keep details · soft = gentle simplify
